name: chr3_3q11_2_HSPA8_SD
description: 3q11.2 pericentric segmental-duplication block with HSPA8, EPHB1 and ARHGEF26 in/near LCR pairs. Contributes to rare submicroscopic 3q11 rearrangements; HSPA8 paralogs (HSP70 family) are dispersed across multiple chromosomes.

architecture.internal_structure: Flanking SDs of 20-60 kb at ~94% identity; HSP70-family paralog signal disperses to chr5q31, chr6p21 etc.
